mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (company_nm, plan, owner_email) VALUES (#{companyNm}, 'FREE', #{ownerEmail})
mapper.select: SELECT company_id FROM company WHERE owner_email = #{ownerEmail} ORDER BY company_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( emp_seq, employeeId, password, active, emp_nm, phone, deptName, position, role, hireDate, company_id ) VALUES ( (SELECT seq FROM (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(emp_seq), 0) + 1 AS seq FROM employee) AS t), #{employeeId}, #{password}, 1, #{adminNm}, #{phone}, '경영지원', '대표', '대표', CURDATE(), #{companyId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company WHERE owner_email = #{ownerEmail}
